title: Record: 8192 Vocab, Sliding Window Eval, Selective Quantization; 1.194 val_bpb
body:
## Submission: 8192 Vocab + Sliding Window Eval + Selective Quantization

**Track:** 10min / 16MB  
**Post-quant val_bpb:** 1.1938 (pre-quant: 1.1791)  
**Model size (w6e8+zlib):** 14,715,057 bytes (14.7 MB)  

### Approach
- **SP-8192 tokenizer** for better token compression
- **NorMuon optimizer** with improved convergence
- **Sliding window evaluation** (stride=256) for more accurate val_bpb
- **Selective quantization (w6e8):** INT6 weights, INT8 embeddings + zlib
- 8-layer model, TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=4096, WARMDOWN_ITERS=3000

### Key Metrics
- Steps: 5467/20000 (wallclock capped at 600s)
- Step avg: 109.76ms
- Hardware: 8×H100 SXM (Vast.ai)

### vs Baseline
| | Baseline | This submission |
|---|---|---|
| val_bpb | 1.2244 | **1.1938** |
| Size | 15.9 MB | **14.7 MB** |
| Vocab | 1024 | 8192 |

Improves on the baseline by ~0.031 bpb while using ~1.2 MB less space.
